texto: Women’s marches are a clever progressive divide and conquer strategy that not only turns women against men, but also turns women against each other in the guise of peace and solidarity. It is a brilliant tactic to employ media propaganda to make privileged women feel oppressed and then program them to think that vulgarity, exhibitionism and emasculation is empowering.
explicacao: Citação de Dawn Perlmutter sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Women’s marches are a clever progressive divide and conquer strategy that not only turns women ag…” articula reflexao, anti-feminism, anti-feminist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como anti-feminist e bodyparts.
